title: Executive Order 8808—American Defense Service Medal

flags.justification: A purely ceremonial military-decoration order, with award criteria delegated to the relevant Service Secretaries.
A ceremonial decoration, not a compliance regime.
No compliance regime exists for an incentive structure to attach to.
A standing decoration program, evergreen by nature.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A purely symbolic and ceremonial action with no structural or authority-claiming content.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.

notes: Validation batch (negative). Structural weight: 0/10 = 0.0%. A purely ceremonial order establishing a military service medal.
